2.ask: what would be the worst thing to reveal right now?
2.flavor: Introduces dark secrets and juicy dramatic reveals at every opportunity.
2.name: DRAMA

3.ask: what would be the worst thing they could (obliviously) do to make trouble right now?
3.flavor: Acts as if they aren’t paying attention or missed the context but is somehow still constantly stirring the pot.
3.name: INSTIGATOR

4.ask: what’s a temptation and how do they indulge it thoughtlessly?
4.flavor: Craves new experiences, and escapes into the game. Doesn't usually think about their allies before acting on temptation.
4.name: IMPULSIVE

5.ask: what is the optimal action here?
5.flavor: Brings their best game. Always pushes the story and adventure towards a dramatic and satisfying conclusion.
5.name: TEAM PLAYER

6.ask: what here is of value to them and how do they seize it?
6.flavor: Cares about keeping their character intact and about amassing something of value, like wealth, experience, or powerful items.
6.name: SELFISH

7.ask: how can they show heroism and what does it cost?
7.flavor: Wants to do the right thing, to be a hero, to be recognized as such.
7.name: HERO

8.ask: what is the most expected thing to do here?
8.flavor: Wants to play the game they signed up for, do what's on their character sheet, and avoid extremes in rules & story.
8.name: SAFE

9.ask: how can this character demonstrate their strength?
9.flavor: Plays skilled characters or ones that demonstrate system mastery; wants to show that off. Motto: "if all you've got is a hammer, everything looks like a nail".
9.name: VIRTUOSO

10.ask: what in their backstory can negatively affect or motivate them, and how do they act because of it?
10.flavor: All about history and character development, but focused on their own character and pet NPCs.
10.name: AUTHOR

11.ask: what in their backstory can positively affect or motivate them, and how do they act because of it?
11.flavor: All about history and character development, but wants to see the whole world explored, and everyone’s story honored.
11.name: EXPLORER

12.ask: what would benefit another player most?
12.flavor: Wants to hang out, to go along with what everyone else is doing, to enjoy their company. Often disappears to make food and drinks, delegating their character to another player.
12.name: AGREEABLE

2.blurb: a focus on relaxing, on entertaining themselves, on pursuing pleasure or enjoying a hobby. Chill out. Who does it hurt?
2.name: PLAYFUL

3.blurb: a focus on a long-term plan or achieving an immediate goal that will serve as a stepping stone. Focus. Rome wasn’t built in a day.
3.name: SERIOUS

4.blurb: a focus on directing the group, on gaining influence or manipulating others. Control. Exploit all the angles.
4.name: POWER

5.blurb: a focus on building up, whether that’s a community or a friend, on figuring out how to move forward, together. Empathy.
5.name: BUILDING

6.blurb: a focus on winning, on achieving a goal, on negotiation from a position of strength. Competitiveness.
6.name: AMBITIOUS

7.blurb: a focus on helping others, on understanding emotions, to negotiate from a position of understanding. Sympathy.
7.name: HELPING HAND

8.blurb: a focus on fitting in, on running with the pack, on enjoying being part of the team or knuckling under authority, for now. Safety in numbers.
8.name: CONFORMING

9.blurb: a focus on fighting authority, on creation, especially creating something that the team won’t approve of or maybe even won’t understand. Marching to my own beat.
9.name: REBELLIOUS

10.blurb: a focus on myself, on my own needs, on getting what I want or what I think I deserve. I deserve this.
10.name: MY NEEDS

11.blurb: a focus on others, on meeting their needs, on providing or not what someone wants, but what they need to thrive. This is for your own good.
11.name: OUR NEEDS

12.blurb: they don’t care, or they really can’t bring themselves to care, regardless, can’t be bothered. Can’t deal.
12.name: APATHETIC

high_strung.11: Well, I can tell you all about...

sassy.8: Not even if you paid double.
sassy.11: I’m as baffled as you are.
sassy.12: Now is not a good time!

savvy.7: Sounds like you’ve considered all the angles.

selfish.8: I could get more for your corpse than that.
